# The Crown building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: the-crown-8350-santa-monica-blvd
- Address: 8350 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90069
- Primary URL: https://thecrownweho.com/
- Management company: First Light Property Management
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Management: 3 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 3 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 5
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site continues to market rooftop and fitness amenities in a central West Hollywood location. Source: The Crown official site (https://thecrownweho.com/). Note: Official copy markets luxury living with studio, one-bedroom, and two-bedroom homes in West Hollywood.
- [review] Apartments.com currently lists controlled access, package service, roof terrace, on-site fitness, and in-home washer/dryer. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/crown-apartments-west-hollywood-ca/7p41k4z/). Note: Current listing shows controlled access, package service, roof terrace, and in-home washer/dryer.
- [review] Birdeye showed a 3.4/5 profile across 14 reviews, which is usable but not pristine. Source: Birdeye (https://reviews.birdeye.com/the-crown-apartments-156783049108434). Note: Birdeye displayed 3.4 stars from 14 reviews.

## Open questions
- Verify full pet fee schedule, package-room reality, and whether rooftop hot tub is the only water amenity.

## Notes
Research complete. The location fit is excellent and the building looks workable on paper, but public resident sentiment is only middling and a few practical details still need direct confirmation.
